_comment: Universal skills the blueprint does NOT vendor. SETUP fetches each from its canonical public repo at install (always latest). Single source of truth — the blueprint never holds a copy that can silently drift. Refresh/export MUST NOT re-vendor these; it only maintains this list. The remaining skills under templates/skills/ are blueprint-owned (p:rnd, p:wave:refine, p:wave:review, p:quality:prompt, p:quality:doc) or domain-hydrated shells (p:audit:code-hygiene, p:audit:security) and ship bundled. Note: the canonical 360 repo's own SKILL.md frontmatter must read `name: p:360` for the install target `skills/p:360/` to fully resolve (external repo — fix it there).
